004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.

006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *

010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http;
018
019import java.net.*;
020import java.time.*;
021import java.util.function.*;
022
023import org.apache.juneau.commons.http.*;
024import org.apache.juneau.http.header.*;
025
026/**
027 * Static factory methods for creating common HTTP headers.
028 *
029 * <p>
030 * This is a convenience class that provides shorthand access to all named header types in
031 * {@code org.apache.juneau.http.header}.
032 *
033 * <p class='bjava'>
034 *    <jc>// Import statically for clean DSL-style usage</jc>
035 *    import static org.apache.juneau.http.HttpHeaders.*;
036 *
037 *    RestRequest <jv>req</jv> = client.get(<js>"/api/resource"</js>)
038 *       .header(accept(<js>"application/json"</js>))
039 *       .header(authorization(<js>"Bearer "</js> + token));
040 * </p>
041 *
042 * <p>
043 * <b>Beta — API subject to change:</b> This type is part of the next-generation REST client and HTTP stack
044 * ({@code org.apache.juneau.marshall.ng.*}).
045 * It is not API-frozen: binary- and source-incompatible changes may appear in the <b>next major</b> Juneau release
046 * (and possibly earlier).
047 *
048 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
049 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/NextGenRestClient">juneau-ng REST client</a>
050 * </ul>
051 *
052 * @since 9.2.1
053 */
054public final class HttpHeaders {
055
056   private HttpHeaders() {}
057
058   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
059   public static Accept accept(String value) { return Accept.of(value); }
060   /** @param value Supplier of the wire header value. @return A new header. */
061   public static Accept acceptLazyWire(Supplier<String> value) { return Accept.ofLazyWire(value); }
062   /** @param value Parsed media ranges. @return A new header. */
063   public static Accept accept(MediaRanges value) { return Accept.of(value); }
064   /** @param value Supplier of parsed media ranges. @return A new header. */
065   public static Accept acceptLazyParsed(Supplier<MediaRanges> value) { return Accept.ofLazyParsed(value); }
066
067   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
068   public static AcceptCharset acceptCharset(String value) { return AcceptCharset.of(value); }
069   /** @param value Supplier of the wire header value. @return A new header. */
070   public static AcceptCharset acceptCharsetLazyWire(Supplier<String> value) { return AcceptCharset.ofLazyWire(value); }
071   /** @param value Parsed string ranges. @return A new header. */
072   public static AcceptCharset acceptCharset(StringRanges value) { return AcceptCharset.of(value); }
073   /** @param value Supplier of string ranges. @return A new header. */
074   public static AcceptCharset acceptCharsetLazyParsed(Supplier<StringRanges> value) { return AcceptCharset.ofLazyParsed(value); }
075
076   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
077   public static AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(String value) { return AcceptEncoding.of(value); }
078   /** @param value Supplier of the wire header value. @return A new header. */
079   public static AcceptEncoding acceptEncodingLazyWire(Supplier<String> value) { return AcceptEncoding.ofLazyWire(value); }
080   /** @param value Parsed string ranges. @return A new header. */
081   public static AcceptEncoding acceptEncoding(StringRanges value) { return AcceptEncoding.of(value); }
082   /** @param value Supplier of string ranges. @return A new header. */
083   public static AcceptEncoding acceptEncodingLazyParsed(Supplier<StringRanges> value) { return AcceptEncoding.ofLazyParsed(value); }
084
085   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
086   public static AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(String value) { return AcceptLanguage.of(value); }
087   /** @param value Supplier of the wire header value. @return A new header. */
088   public static AcceptLanguage acceptLanguageLazyWire(Supplier<String> value) { return AcceptLanguage.ofLazyWire(value); }
089   /** @param value Parsed string ranges. @return A new header. */
090   public static AcceptLanguage acceptLanguage(StringRanges value) { return AcceptLanguage.of(value); }
091   /** @param value Supplier of string ranges. @return A new header. */
092   public static AcceptLanguage acceptLanguageLazyParsed(Supplier<StringRanges> value) { return AcceptLanguage.ofLazyParsed(value); }
093
094   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
095   public static AcceptRanges acceptRanges(String value) { return AcceptRanges.of(value); }
096   /** @param value The header value supplier. @return A new header. */
097   public static AcceptRanges acceptRanges(Supplier<String> value) { return AcceptRanges.of(value); }
098
099   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
100   public static Age age(String value) { return Age.of(value); }
101   /** @param seconds Age in seconds. @return A new header. */
102   public static Age age(int seconds) { return Age.of(seconds); }
103
104   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
105   public static Allow allow(String value) { return Allow.of(value); }
106   /** @param methods Allowed methods. @return A new header. */
107   public static Allow allow(String... methods) { return Allow.of(methods); }
108   /** @param tokenSupplier Lazy token list. @return A new header. */
109   public static Allow allowLazyTokens(Supplier<String[]> tokenSupplier) { return Allow.ofLazyTokens(tokenSupplier); }
110
111   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
112   public static Authorization authorization(String value) { return Authorization.of(value); }
113   /** @param value The header value supplier. @return A new header. */
114   public static Authorization authorization(Supplier<String> value) { return Authorization.of(value); }
115
116   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
117   public static CacheControl cacheControl(String value) { return CacheControl.of(value); }
118   /** @param value The header value supplier. @return A new header. */
119   public static CacheControl cacheControl(Supplier<String> value) { return CacheControl.of(value); }
120
121   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
122   public static Connection connection(String value) { return Connection.of(value); }
123
124   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
125   public static ContentDisposition contentDisposition(String value) { return ContentDisposition.of(value); }
126   /** @param value Parsed string ranges. @return A new header. */
127   public static ContentDisposition contentDisposition(StringRanges value) { return ContentDisposition.of(value); }
128   /** @param value Supplier of string ranges. @return A new header. */
129   public static ContentDisposition contentDisposition(Supplier<StringRanges> value) { return ContentDisposition.ofLazyParsed(value); }
130
131   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
132   public static ContentEncoding contentEncoding(String value) { return ContentEncoding.of(value); }
133
134   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
135   public static ContentLanguage contentLanguage(String value) { return ContentLanguage.of(value); }
136
137   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
138   public static ContentLength contentLength(String value) { return ContentLength.of(value); }
139   /** @param bytes The content length in bytes. @return A new header. */
140   public static ContentLength contentLength(long bytes) { return ContentLength.of(bytes); }
141
142   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
143   public static ContentLocation contentLocation(String value) { return ContentLocation.of(value); }
144   /** @param uri Content location URI. @return A new header. */
145   public static ContentLocation contentLocation(URI uri) { return ContentLocation.of(uri); }
146
147   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
148   public static ContentRange contentRange(String value) { return ContentRange.of(value); }
149
150   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
151   public static ContentType contentType(String value) { return ContentType.of(value); }
152   /** @param value Supplier of the wire header value. @return A new header. */
153   public static ContentType contentTypeLazyWire(Supplier<String> value) { return ContentType.ofLazyWire(value); }
154   /** @param value Parsed media type. @return A new header. */
155   public static ContentType contentType(MediaType value) { return ContentType.of(value); }
156   /** @param value Supplier of media type. @return A new header. */
157   public static ContentType contentTypeLazyParsed(Supplier<MediaType> value) { return ContentType.ofLazyParsed(value); }
158
159   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
160   public static Date date(String value) { return Date.of(value); }
161   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
162   public static Date date(ZonedDateTime value) { return Date.of(value); }
163
164   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
165   public static ETag eTag(String value) { return ETag.of(value); }
166   /** @param value Parsed entity-tag. @return A new header. */
167   public static ETag eTag(EntityTag value) { return ETag.of(value); }
168
169   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
170   public static Expect expect(String value) { return Expect.of(value); }
171
172   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
173   public static Expires expires(String value) { return Expires.of(value); }
174   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
175   public static Expires expires(ZonedDateTime value) { return Expires.of(value); }
176
177   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
178   public static Forwarded forwarded(String value) { return Forwarded.of(value); }
179
180   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
181   public static From from(String value) { return From.of(value); }
182
183   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
184   public static Host host(String value) { return Host.of(value); }
185
186   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
187   public static IfMatch ifMatch(String value) { return IfMatch.of(value); }
188   /** @param value Parsed entity-tags. @return A new header. */
189   public static IfMatch ifMatch(EntityTags value) { return IfMatch.of(value); }
190
191   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
192   public static IfModifiedSince ifModifiedSince(String value) { return IfModifiedSince.of(value); }
193   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
194   public static IfModifiedSince ifModifiedSince(ZonedDateTime value) { return IfModifiedSince.of(value); }
195
196   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
197   public static IfNoneMatch ifNoneMatch(String value) { return IfNoneMatch.of(value); }
198   /** @param value Parsed entity-tags. @return A new header. */
199   public static IfNoneMatch ifNoneMatch(EntityTags value) { return IfNoneMatch.of(value); }
200
201   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
202   public static IfRange ifRange(String value) { return IfRange.of(value); }
203   /** @param value Entity-tag. @return A new header. */
204   public static IfRange ifRange(EntityTag value) { return IfRange.of(value); }
205   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
206   public static IfRange ifRange(ZonedDateTime value) { return IfRange.of(value); }
207   /** @param value Supplier of tag or date. @return A new header. */
208   public static IfRange ifRange(Supplier<?> value) { return IfRange.of(value); }
209
210   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
211   public static IfUnmodifiedSince ifUnmodifiedSince(String value) { return IfUnmodifiedSince.of(value); }
212   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
213   public static IfUnmodifiedSince ifUnmodifiedSince(ZonedDateTime value) { return IfUnmodifiedSince.of(value); }
214
215   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
216   public static LastModified lastModified(String value) { return LastModified.of(value); }
217   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
218   public static LastModified lastModified(ZonedDateTime value) { return LastModified.of(value); }
219
220   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
221   public static Location location(String value) { return Location.of(value); }
222   /** @param uri Redirect URI. @return A new header. */
223   public static Location location(URI uri) { return Location.of(uri); }
224
225   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
226   public static MaxForwards maxForwards(String value) { return MaxForwards.of(value); }
227   /** @param hops Max forwards count. @return A new header. */
228   public static MaxForwards maxForwards(int hops) { return MaxForwards.of(hops); }
229
230   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
231   public static Origin origin(String value) { return Origin.of(value); }
232
233   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
234   public static Pragma pragma(String value) { return Pragma.of(value); }
235
236   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
237   public static ProxyAuthenticate proxyAuthenticate(String value) { return ProxyAuthenticate.of(value); }
238
239   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
240   public static ProxyAuthorization proxyAuthorization(String value) { return ProxyAuthorization.of(value); }
241
242   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
243   public static Range range(String value) { return Range.of(value); }
244
245   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
246   public static Referer referer(String value) { return Referer.of(value); }
247   /** @param uri Referer URI. @return A new header. */
248   public static Referer referer(URI uri) { return Referer.of(uri); }
249
250   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
251   public static RetryAfter retryAfter(String value) { return RetryAfter.of(value); }
252   /** @param seconds Delta seconds. @return A new header. */
253   public static RetryAfter retryAfter(int seconds) { return RetryAfter.of(Integer.valueOf(seconds)); }
254   /** @param value HTTP-date. @return A new header. */
255   public static RetryAfter retryAfter(ZonedDateTime value) { return RetryAfter.of(value); }
256   /** @param value Supplier of seconds or date. @return A new header. */
257   public static RetryAfter retryAfter(Supplier<?> value) { return RetryAfter.of(value); }
258
259   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
260   public static Server server(String value) { return Server.of(value); }
261
262   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
263   public static TE te(String value) { return TE.of(value); }
264   /** @param value Parsed string ranges. @return A new header. */
265   public static TE te(StringRanges value) { return TE.of(value); }
266   /** @param value Supplier of the wire header value. @return A new header. */
267   public static TE teLazyWire(Supplier<String> value) { return TE.ofLazyWire(value); }
268   /** @param value Supplier of string ranges. @return A new header. */
269   public static TE teLazyParsed(Supplier<StringRanges> value) { return TE.ofLazyParsed(value); }
270
271   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
272   public static Trailer trailer(String value) { return Trailer.of(value); }
273
274   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
275   public static TransferEncoding transferEncoding(String value) { return TransferEncoding.of(value); }
276
277   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
278   public static Upgrade upgrade(String value) { return Upgrade.of(value); }
279
280   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
281   public static UserAgent userAgent(String value) { return UserAgent.of(value); }
282   /** @param value The header value supplier. @return A new header. */
283   public static UserAgent userAgent(Supplier<String> value) { return UserAgent.of(value); }
284
285   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
286   public static Vary vary(String value) { return Vary.of(value); }
287
288   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
289   public static Via via(String value) { return Via.of(value); }
290
291   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
292   public static Warning warning(String value) { return Warning.of(value); }
293
294   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
295   public static WwwAuthenticate wwwAuthenticate(String value) { return WwwAuthenticate.of(value); }
296
297   // Juneau-specific headers
298   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
299   public static NoTrace noTrace(String value) { return NoTrace.of(value); }
300   /** @return A no-trace header with value {@code "true"}. */
301   public static NoTrace noTrace() { return NoTrace.of("true"); }
302
303   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
304   public static Debug debug(String value) { return Debug.of(value); }
305   /** @return A debug header with value {@code "true"}. */
306   public static Debug debug() { return Debug.of("true"); }
307
308   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
309   public static ClientVersion clientVersion(String value) { return ClientVersion.of(value); }
310
311   /** @param value The header value. @return A new header. */
312   public static Thrown thrown(String value) { return Thrown.of(value); }
313
314   /**
315    * Creates a generic {@link HttpHeader} with the given name and value.
316    *
317    * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
318    * @param value The header value. May be <jk>null</jk>.
319    * @return A new header. Never <jk>null</jk>.
320    */
321   public static HttpHeader header(String name, String value) {
322      return HttpHeaderBean.of(name, value);
323   }
324
325   /**
326    * Creates a generic {@link HttpHeader} with a lazy value supplier.
327    *
328    * @param name The header name. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
329    * @param valueSupplier Supplier for the header value. Must not be <jk>null</jk>.
330    * @return A new header. Never <jk>null</jk>.
331    */
332   public static HttpHeader header(String name, Supplier<String> valueSupplier) {
333      return HttpHeaderBean.of(name, valueSupplier);
334   }
335}
